titleStmt.title: A Transcription of John in 1788
GA 1788
The New Testament
Das Neue Testament
The Gospel according to John
john

respStmt.name: the International Greek New Testament Project

titleStmt.funder: The Arts and Humanities Research Council

sponsor.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing

publisher.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing
University of Birmingham

availability.p: Licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License (CC BY 4.0): available for re-use provided attribution is made to the original creators (the IGNTP and any named participants) and an indication is given of any changes made. See further .

projectDesc.p: This transcription was made by the International Greek New Testament Project in its work towards the Editio Critica Maior of John between 2010 and 2013.

editorialDecl.p: The initial transcription file was a plain text file for use with COLLATE, later converted to XML. The original transcription guidelines can be found at
The plain text file was converted to XML by Catherine Smith using the project's Python conversion scripts 1.0.
The XML specifications used are version 1.4 of the IGNTP Guidelines available at

revisionDesc.change: τη deleted at 18.20 by David Parker.
7.43 block marker moved forward 17 words by Rachel Kevern.
* εκ της γης λ λ̣εγει εστι C OM changed to * λαλει εκ [6-8] C εστι at 3.31 by Rachel Kevern.
πατρος moved from 6.39 to 6.38 by Rachel Kevern.
Word break corrected at 2.10 by David Parker.
Word break corrected at 5.5 by David Parker.
Number and nomen sacrum tagging of proper names deleted by David Parker.
Nomen sacrum tagged in 19.18 by David Parker.
Word break in 3.31 corrected by David Parker.
Adjusted to XML specifications 1.4 by Hugh Houghton.
Converted from plain text by Catherine Smith using Python conversion scripts 1.0.

body.note: Status:G-Α 1788Sofia ͂Ιvan Dujcev ͂ Research Centre, 289 John begins Folio 239 recto (1,18)Τranscribed by: WJΕ Τranscription begun: 01-04-08Τranscription finished: 24-04-08Does this manuscript contain (delete and complete as appropriate): Lectionary annotations - Yes Initials and other enlarged letters - Yes Diples (>) - No Yes on the following folios 00r, 00v ... Obeloi (†) - No Yes: on the following folios 00r, 00v ...Other remarks: Ρeculiar abbreviation:ιoυδαιoι] ιδαιoι 1,19; 5,16; 7,1; 9,18; 18,20; 19,12. Τhe part played by corrector is an enigma. Μany folios have a strip of vellum attached to outer edge, containing odd letters. Logically they should be corrector, but the individual letters are so similar to first hand as not to be easily distinguished. Τhis is compounded on folio 282, which could be supplementary, as the script deteriorates. Αnother interesting point, which may be relevant is that some folio numbers are on the main part others on the added strip - there seems no logic.Οn folio 275v Ι have never noticed a right justified line ΟΝΕ before the last line before.FINAL plain text transcription date: 24.04.2103

ab.note: Cannot see the accent because the available image is overexposed.
